creation_query.query:
-- Version Control
-- (2025-09-11) - Erald change currently_active_this_day from WHEN DATE(resigned_jkt_date) = day OR DATE(terminated_jkt_date) = day 
-- -------------- to WHEN DATE(resigned_jkt_date) > day OR DATE(terminated_jkt_date) > day
-- (2025-11-14) - Amalia Change logic to OR to AND in witdraw join 
-- (2025-12-09) - Added is_last_day_of_month and is_last_day_of_week flag

CREATE OR REPLACE TABLE
  `ledger-fcc1e.merchant_success_analytics.ms_daily_status_log`
PARTITION BY day
  AS 


WITH base_data AS (
  SELECT
    candidate_name,
    phone_number,
    area_placement,
    district_coverage,
    vendor_name,
    vendor_type,
    role_type,
    prospero_email,
    CASE WHEN LOWER(vendor_name) LIKE "%permanen%" THEN 1 ELSE 0 END is_permanent,
    start_date_ms_active,
    resigned_jkt_date,
    terminated_jkt_date,
    reason_for_resignation_or_termination,
    reason_type_for_resignation_or_termination,
    COALESCE(resigned_jkt_date, terminated_jkt_date, CURRENT_DATE()) AS end_date
  FROM `ledger-fcc1e.merchant_success_analytics.ms_form_hiring_and_active`
  WHERE 
    -- role_type = "MERCHANT_SALES_EXECUTIVE"
    -- AND 
    (
      (current_hiring_status LIKE "%ACTIVE%" OR start_date_ms_active IS NOT NULL)
      AND (withdraw_join_first_flag IS NULL
          -- AND ojt_not_join_first_flag IS NULL
          AND current_hiring_status NOT LIKE "%REJEC%")
    )
    -- AND 
    -- UPPER(candidate_name) LIKE "%AUFA MUI%"

),

exploded_days AS (
  SELECT 
    candidate_name,
    phone_number,
    area_placement,
    district_coverage,
    vendor_name,
    vendor_type,
    role_type,
    prospero_email,
    is_permanent,
    start_date_ms_active,
    resigned_jkt_date,
    terminated_jkt_date,
    day,
    reason_for_resignation_or_termination,
    reason_type_for_resignation_or_termination,
  FROM base_data,
  UNNEST(
    GENERATE_DATE_ARRAY(
      DATE(start_date_ms_active),
      DATE(COALESCE(resigned_jkt_date, terminated_jkt_date, CURRENT_DATE())),
      INTERVAL 1 DAY
    )
  ) AS day
),

base AS (
  SELECT
    candidate_name,
    phone_number,
    area_placement,
    district_coverage,
    vendor_type,
    role_type,
    prospero_email,
    vendor_name,
    is_permanent,
    day,
    start_date_ms_active,
    reason_for_resignation_or_termination,
    reason_type_for_resignation_or_termination,
    DATE(start_date_ms_active) AS joined_day,
    CASE WHEN DATE(start_date_ms_active) = day THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_joined_this_day,
    DATE(resigned_jkt_date) AS resigned_day,
    CASE WHEN DATE(resigned_jkt_date) = day THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_resigned_this_day,
    DATE(terminated_jkt_date) AS terminated_day,
    CASE WHEN DATE(terminated_jkt_date) = day THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_terminated_this_day,

    -- Active only if NOT resigned or terminated this day
    CASE 
      WHEN DATE(resigned_jkt_date) = day 
        OR DATE(terminated_jkt_date) = day 
      THEN 1 
      ELSE 1 
    END AS currently_active_this_day,

    -- Flag: is this the last day of the month for this MSE?
    CASE 
      WHEN day = MAX(day) OVER (PARTITION BY DATE_TRUNC(day, MONTH)) 
      THEN TRUE 
      ELSE FALSE 
    END AS is_last_day_of_month,
        CASE 
      WHEN day = MAX(day) OVER (PARTITION BY DATE_TRUNC(day, WEEK)) 
      THEN TRUE 
      ELSE FALSE 
    END AS is_last_day_of_week,

      CASE
        WHEN day < DATE(start_date_ms_active) THEN 0
        WHEN EXTRACT(DAY FROM DATE(start_date_ms_active)) > 20 
          THEN DATE_DIFF(DATE_TRUNC(day, MONTH), DATE_TRUNC(start_date_ms_active, MONTH), MONTH) - 1
        ELSE DATE_DIFF(DATE_TRUNC(day, MONTH), DATE_TRUNC(start_date_ms_active, MONTH), MONTH)
      END AS diff_month,
      CASE
  WHEN resigned_jkt_date IS NOT NULL THEN
    CASE
      WHEN EXTRACT(DAY FROM DATE(start_date_ms_active)) > 20 
        THEN DATE_DIFF(DATE_TRUNC(resigned_jkt_date, MONTH), DATE_TRUNC(start_date_ms_active, MONTH), MONTH) - 1
      ELSE DATE_DIFF(DATE_TRUNC(resigned_jkt_date, MONTH), DATE_TRUNC(start_date_ms_active, MONTH), MONTH)
    END
  WHEN terminated_jkt_date IS NOT NULL THEN
    CASE
      WHEN EXTRACT(DAY FROM DATE(start_date_ms_active)) > 20 
        THEN DATE_DIFF(DATE_TRUNC(terminated_jkt_date, MONTH), DATE_TRUNC(start_date_ms_active, MONTH), MONTH) - 1
      ELSE DATE_DIFF(DATE_TRUNC(terminated_jkt_date, MONTH), DATE_TRUNC(start_date_ms_active, MONTH), MONTH)
    END
  ELSE NULL
END AS diff_month_resignation_termination
  FROM exploded_days
)

SELECT 
  * EXCEPT(diff_month, diff_month_resignation_termination),
  diff_month,
  diff_month_resignation_termination,
  CASE 
    WHEN diff_month <= 0 THEN "(a) M0 - New, Joined This Month"
    WHEN diff_month = 1 THEN "(b) M1 - Joined Last Month"
    WHEN diff_month = 2 THEN "(c) M2 - Joined 2 Months Ago"
    WHEN diff_month > 2 THEN "(d) >M2 - Joined More Than 2 Months Ago"
  END AS mse_join_category,
   CASE 
    WHEN is_resigned_this_day = 1 OR is_terminated_this_day = 1 THEN
      CASE 
        WHEN diff_month_resignation_termination <= 0 THEN "(a) M0 - Resigned/Terminated in Join Month"
        WHEN diff_month_resignation_termination = 1 THEN "(b) M1 - Resigned/Terminated 1 Month After Join"
        WHEN diff_month_resignation_termination = 2 THEN "(c) M2 - Resigned/Terminated 2 Months After Join"
        WHEN diff_month_resignation_termination > 2 THEN "(d) >M2 - Resigned/Terminated >2 Months After Join"
      END
    ELSE "(e) Still Active - No Resignation/Termination"
  END AS mse_resignation_termination_category
FROM base
